div.h2: Case Study: ISIS Peer State Verification Failure

g.title: Initializes ISIS configuration and interface mapping
NSKK Converter call to apply ISIS settings
Failed: Output does not contain 'State: Up'

div.p: Error: [expect检查] 字符串宽松检查失败 Command: display isis peer Expected: State: Up Actual: 回显信息为空
